violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Multiple floor tiles located in the storefront area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The floors in the ware washing area are constructed of carpet, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front of the store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
Multiple floor tiles in the storefront area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
